reviews.comment:
Excelente estación, muy buenos baños y un pequeño recreo atrás con mesas para almorzar bajo los árboles.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station, very good restrooms and a small recreation area at the back with tables for lunch under the trees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURta011RG13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo muy sucio y la atención muy lenta. A pesar que era época de vacaciones temporada alta no se preocupaban mucho en atender. Si estás dispuesto a perder tiempo pasa por ahí.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was very dirty and the service was incredibly slow. Even though it was peak holiday season, they didn't seem to care much. If you're willing to waste your time, go there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNE8zRVlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente, como cada ypf del Acá del país. Lugar para descansar bajo los árboles y con juegos para chicos. Baños excelentes.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, like every YPF hotel in the country. A place to relax under the trees, with games for children. Excellent bathrooms.
